# zenwebp public API — supported surface (default features)
# (regenerated on every `cargo test` by zenutils-apidoc; ZEN_API_DOC=check verifies, =off skips).
# Encodings: crate-name prefix stripped; auto traits collapse to a
# count + exceptions; trait impls collapse to one roster line per
# type (method signatures live at the trait definition); blanket
# impls omitted; re-export duplicates annotated `[also: path]`.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes with the code.
#
# files: zenwebp.txt 855 lines (supported surface) | zenwebp.features.txt 31 added (features: ablation,analyzer,avx512,cms,fast-yuv,imgref,mode_debug,pixel-types,std,target-zensim,testable_dispatch) | zenwebp.internal.txt 989 lines (1292 hidden + 219 excluded-feature)

## summary
#
#   pub modules                                11
#   pub types (struct/enum/trait/alias)        72
#   pub consts/statics                         16
#   free functions                             51
#   inherent methods                          257
#   struct fields                             220
#   enum variants                             178
#   re-exports                                 17
#   trait roster entries (type × trait)       163
#   auto-trait-complete types                  36
#   auto-trait exceptions                      13
#
# per-module pub lines:
#   (root)                          320
#   decoder                          95
#   detect                           25
#   encoder                         155
#   heuristics                       14
#   metadata                         10
#   mux                             135
#   oneshot                          16
#   pixel                            11
#   zencodec                         41

pub mod heuristics
#[non_exhaustive] pub struct heuristics::DecodeEstimate
pub heuristics::DecodeEstimate::output_bytes: u64
pub heuristics::DecodeEstimate::peak_memory_bytes: u64
pub heuristics::DecodeEstimate::time_ms: f32

pub heuristics::EncodeEstimate::output_bytes: u64
pub heuristics::EncodeEstimate::peak_memory_bytes: u64
pub heuristics::EncodeEstimate::peak_memory_bytes_max: u64
pub heuristics::EncodeEstimate::peak_memory_bytes_min: u64

pub mod metadata
pub fn metadata::embed(&[u8], &ImageMetadata<'_>) -> mux::MuxResult<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>
pub fn metadata::embed_exif(&[u8], &[u8]) -> mux::MuxResult<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>
pub fn metadata::embed_icc(&[u8], &[u8]) -> mux::MuxResult<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>
pub fn metadata::embed_xmp(&[u8], &[u8]) -> mux::MuxResult<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>
pub fn metadata::exif(&[u8]) -> mux::MuxResult<core::option::Option<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>>
pub fn metadata::icc_profile(&[u8]) -> mux::MuxResult<core::option::Option<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>>
pub fn metadata::remove_exif(&[u8]) -> mux::MuxResult<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>
pub fn metadata::remove_icc(&[u8]) -> mux::MuxResult<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>
pub fn metadata::remove_xmp(&[u8]) -> mux::MuxResult<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>
pub fn metadata::xmp(&[u8]) -> mux::MuxResult<core::option::Option<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>>
pub mod mux
pub enum mux::BlendMethod
pub mux::BlendMethod::AlphaBlend
pub mux::BlendMethod::Overwrite
pub enum mux::DisposeMethod
pub mux::DisposeMethod::Background
pub mux::DisposeMethod::None
#[non_exhaustive] pub enum mux::MuxError
pub mux::MuxError::DecodeError(DecodeError)
pub mux::MuxError::EncodeError(EncodeError)
pub mux::MuxError::FrameOutOfBounds
pub mux::MuxError::FrameOutOfBounds::index: u32
pub mux::MuxError::FrameOutOfBounds::total: u32
pub mux::MuxError::FrameOutsideCanvas
pub mux::MuxError::FrameOutsideCanvas::canvas_height: u32
pub mux::MuxError::FrameOutsideCanvas::canvas_width: u32
pub mux::MuxError::FrameOutsideCanvas::height: u32
pub mux::MuxError::FrameOutsideCanvas::width: u32
pub mux::MuxError::FrameOutsideCanvas::x: u32
pub mux::MuxError::FrameOutsideCanvas::y: u32
pub mux::MuxError::InvalidDimensions
pub mux::MuxError::InvalidDimensions::height: u32
pub mux::MuxError::InvalidDimensions::width: u32
pub mux::MuxError::InvalidFormat(alloc::string::String)
pub mux::MuxError::NoFrames
pub mux::MuxError::OddFrameOffset
pub mux::MuxError::OddFrameOffset::x: u32
pub mux::MuxError::OddFrameOffset::y: u32
pub struct mux::AnimFrame
pub mux::AnimFrame::data: alloc::vec::Vec<u8>
pub mux::AnimFrame::duration_ms: u32
pub mux::AnimFrame::height: u32
pub mux::AnimFrame::timestamp_ms: u32
pub mux::AnimFrame::width: u32
pub struct mux::AnimationConfig
pub mux::AnimationConfig::background_color: [u8; 4]
pub mux::AnimationConfig::loop_count: decoder::LoopCount
pub mux::AnimationConfig::minimize_size: bool
pub struct mux::AnimationDecoder<'a>
pub fn mux::AnimationDecoder<'a>::current_frame_data(&self) -> &[u8]
pub fn mux::AnimationDecoder<'a>::decode_all(&mut self) -> core::result::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<mux::AnimFrame>, whereat::at::At<DecodeError>>
pub fn mux::AnimationDecoder<'a>::decode_next(&mut self) -> core::result::Result<core::option::Option<mux::FrameInfo>, whereat::at::At<DecodeError>>
pub fn mux::AnimationDecoder<'a>::exif_metadata(&mut self) -> core::result::Result<core::option::Option<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>, whereat::at::At<DecodeError>>
pub fn mux::AnimationDecoder<'a>::frames_read(&self) -> u32
pub fn mux::AnimationDecoder<'a>::has_more_frames(&self) -> bool
pub fn mux::AnimationDecoder<'a>::icc_profile(&mut self) -> core::result::Result<core::option::Option<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>, whereat::at::At<DecodeError>>
pub fn mux::AnimationDecoder<'a>::info(&self) -> mux::AnimationInfo
pub fn mux::AnimationDecoder<'a>::loop_duration(&self) -> u64
pub fn mux::AnimationDecoder<'a>::new(&'a [u8]) -> core::result::Result<Self, whereat::at::At<DecodeError>>
pub fn mux::AnimationDecoder<'a>::new_with_config(&'a [u8], &DecodeConfig) -> core::result::Result<Self, whereat::at::At<DecodeError>>
pub fn mux::AnimationDecoder<'a>::next_frame(&mut self) -> core::result::Result<core::option::Option<mux::AnimFrame>, whereat::at::At<DecodeError>>
pub fn mux::AnimationDecoder<'a>::reset(&mut self) -> core::result::Result<(), whereat::at::At<DecodeError>>
pub fn mux::AnimationDecoder<'a>::set_background_color(&mut self, [u8; 4]) -> core::result::Result<(), whereat::at::At<DecodeError>>
pub fn mux::AnimationDecoder<'a>::set_lossy_upsampling(&mut self, decoder::UpsamplingMethod)
pub fn mux::AnimationDecoder<'a>::set_memory_limit(&mut self, usize)
pub fn mux::AnimationDecoder<'a>::set_stop(&mut self, &'a dyn enough::Stop)
pub fn mux::AnimationDecoder<'a>::xmp_metadata(&mut self) -> core::result::Result<core::option::Option<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>, whereat::at::At<DecodeError>>

pub fn mux::AnimationEncoder::add_frame(&mut self, &[u8], PixelLayout, u32, &EncoderConfig) -> mux::MuxResult<()>

pub fn mux::AnimationEncoder::exif(&mut self, alloc::vec::Vec<u8>)
pub fn mux::AnimationEncoder::finalize(self, u32) -> mux::MuxResult<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>

pub fn mux::AnimationEncoder::xmp(&mut self, alloc::vec::Vec<u8>)

pub mux::DemuxFrame::bitstream: &'a [u8]
pub mux::DemuxFrame::blend: mux::BlendMethod
pub mux::DemuxFrame::dispose: mux::DisposeMethod

pub mux::DemuxFrame::frame_num: u32
pub mux::DemuxFrame::has_alpha: bool
pub mux::DemuxFrame::height: u32
pub mux::DemuxFrame::is_lossy: bool
pub mux::DemuxFrame::width: u32
pub mux::DemuxFrame::x_offset: u32
pub mux::DemuxFrame::y_offset: u32
pub struct mux::DemuxFrameIter<'a, 'b>

pub mux::FrameInfo::height: u32

pub mux::MuxFrame::bitstream: alloc::vec::Vec<u8>
pub mux::MuxFrame::blend: mux::BlendMethod
pub mux::MuxFrame::dispose: mux::DisposeMethod

pub mux::MuxFrame::height: u32
pub mux::MuxFrame::is_lossless: bool
pub mux::MuxFrame::width: u32
pub mux::MuxFrame::x_offset: u32
pub mux::MuxFrame::y_offset: u32
pub struct mux::WebPDemuxer<'a>
pub fn mux::WebPDemuxer<'a>::background_color(&self) -> [u8; 4]
pub fn mux::WebPDemuxer<'a>::canvas_height(&self) -> u32
pub fn mux::WebPDemuxer<'a>::canvas_width(&self) -> u32
pub fn mux::WebPDemuxer<'a>::exif(&self) -> core::option::Option<&'a [u8]>
pub fn mux::WebPDemuxer<'a>::frame(&self, u32) -> core::option::Option<mux::DemuxFrame<'a>>
pub fn mux::WebPDemuxer<'a>::frame_count(&self) -> u32
pub fn mux::WebPDemuxer<'a>::frames(&self) -> mux::DemuxFrameIter<'a, '_>
pub fn mux::WebPDemuxer<'a>::has_alpha(&self) -> bool
pub fn mux::WebPDemuxer<'a>::icc_profile(&self) -> core::option::Option<&'a [u8]>
pub fn mux::WebPDemuxer<'a>::is_animated(&self) -> bool
pub fn mux::WebPDemuxer<'a>::loop_count(&self) -> decoder::LoopCount

pub fn mux::WebPDemuxer<'a>::num_frames(&self) -> u32
pub fn mux::WebPDemuxer<'a>::xmp(&self) -> core::option::Option<&'a [u8]>
pub struct mux::WebPMux
pub fn mux::WebPMux::assemble(&self) -> mux::MuxResult<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>
pub fn mux::WebPMux::clear_exif(&mut self)
pub fn mux::WebPMux::clear_icc_profile(&mut self)
pub fn mux::WebPMux::clear_xmp(&mut self)
pub fn mux::WebPMux::downgrade_single_frame_to_static(&mut self)
pub fn mux::WebPMux::exif(&self) -> core::option::Option<&[u8]>
pub fn mux::WebPMux::from_data(&[u8]) -> mux::MuxResult<Self>
pub fn mux::WebPMux::icc_profile(&self) -> core::option::Option<&[u8]>
pub fn mux::WebPMux::new(u32, u32) -> Self
pub fn mux::WebPMux::num_frames(&self) -> u32
pub fn mux::WebPMux::push_frame(&mut self, mux::MuxFrame) -> mux::MuxResult<()>
pub fn mux::WebPMux::set_animation(&mut self, [u8; 4], decoder::LoopCount)
pub fn mux::WebPMux::set_exif(&mut self, alloc::vec::Vec<u8>)
pub fn mux::WebPMux::set_icc_profile(&mut self, alloc::vec::Vec<u8>)
pub fn mux::WebPMux::set_image(&mut self, mux::MuxFrame)
pub fn mux::WebPMux::set_xmp(&mut self, alloc::vec::Vec<u8>)
pub fn mux::WebPMux::xmp(&self) -> core::option::Option<&[u8]>
pub type mux::MuxResult<T> = core::result::Result<T, whereat::at::At<mux::MuxError>>
pub mod oneshot
pub mod pixel
pub trait pixel::DecodePixel: core::marker::Copy + 'static + pixel::private::Sealed
pub const pixel::DecodePixel::CHANNELS: usize
pub const pixel::DecodePixel::HAS_ALPHA: bool
pub const pixel::DecodePixel::IS_BGR: bool
pub trait pixel::EncodePixel: core::marker::Copy + 'static + pixel::private::Sealed
pub const pixel::EncodePixel::CHANNELS: usize
pub fn pixel::EncodePixel::color_type() -> PixelLayout
pub fn pixel::decode<P: pixel::DecodePixel>(&[u8]) -> DecodeResult<(alloc::vec::Vec<P>, u32, u32)> where [u8]: rgb::legacy::internal::convert::AsPixels<P>
pub fn pixel::decode_append<P: pixel::DecodePixel>(&[u8], &mut alloc::vec::Vec<P>) -> DecodeResult<(u32, u32)> where [u8]: rgb::legacy::internal::convert::AsPixels<P>
pub fn pixel::decode_into<P: pixel::DecodePixel>(&[u8], &mut [P], u32) -> DecodeResult<(u32, u32)> where [P]: rgb::legacy::internal::pixel::ComponentBytes<u8>
pub fn pixel::encode<P: pixel::EncodePixel>(&[P], u32, u32) -> EncodeResult<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>> where [P]: rgb::legacy::internal::pixel::ComponentBytes<u8>

#[non_exhaustive] pub enum DecodeError [also: decoder]
pub DecodeError::AlphaChunkSizeMismatch
pub DecodeError::BitStreamError
pub DecodeError::Cancelled(enough::reason::StopReason)
pub DecodeError::ChromaPredictionModeInvalid(i8)
pub DecodeError::ChunkHeaderInvalid([u8; 4])
pub DecodeError::ChunkMissing
pub DecodeError::ColorSpaceInvalid(u8)
pub DecodeError::FrameOutsideImage
pub DecodeError::HuffmanError
pub DecodeError::ImageTooLarge
pub DecodeError::InconsistentImageSizes
pub DecodeError::IntraPredictionModeInvalid(i8)
pub DecodeError::InvalidAlphaPreprocessing
pub DecodeError::InvalidChunkSize
pub DecodeError::InvalidColorCacheBits(u8)
pub DecodeError::InvalidCompressionMethod
pub DecodeError::InvalidParameter(alloc::string::String)
pub DecodeError::IoError(std::io::error::Error)
pub DecodeError::LosslessSignatureInvalid(u8)
pub DecodeError::LumaPredictionModeInvalid(i8)
pub DecodeError::MemoryLimitExceeded
pub DecodeError::NoMoreFrames
pub DecodeError::NotEnoughInitData
pub DecodeError::RiffSignatureInvalid([u8; 4])
pub DecodeError::TransformError
pub DecodeError::UnsupportedFeature(alloc::string::String)
pub DecodeError::UnsupportedOperation(zencodec::capabilities::UnsupportedOperation)
pub DecodeError::VersionNumberInvalid(u8)
pub DecodeError::Vp8MagicInvalid([u8; 3])
pub DecodeError::WebpSignatureInvalid([u8; 4])
#[non_exhaustive] pub enum EncodeError [also: encoder]
pub EncodeError::Cancelled(enough::reason::StopReason)
pub EncodeError::IccSynthesisUnavailable(alloc::string::String)
pub EncodeError::InvalidBufferSize(alloc::string::String)
pub EncodeError::InvalidDimensions
pub EncodeError::IoError(std::io::error::Error)
pub EncodeError::LimitExceeded(alloc::string::String)
pub EncodeError::Partition0Overflow
pub EncodeError::Partition0Overflow::max: u32
pub EncodeError::Partition0Overflow::size: u32
pub EncodeError::TargetZensimUnsupportedLayout(PixelLayout)
pub EncodeError::UnsupportedOperation(zencodec::capabilities::UnsupportedOperation)
pub enum PixelLayout [also: encoder]
pub PixelLayout::Argb8
pub PixelLayout::Bgr8
pub PixelLayout::Bgra8
pub PixelLayout::L8
pub PixelLayout::La8
pub PixelLayout::Rgb8
pub PixelLayout::Rgba8
pub PixelLayout::Yuv420
#[non_exhaustive] pub enum Preset [also: encoder]
pub Preset::Auto
pub Preset::Default
pub Preset::Drawing
pub Preset::Icon
pub Preset::Photo
pub Preset::Picture
pub Preset::Text
#[non_exhaustive] pub enum ValidationError [also: encoder, encoder::validation]
pub ValidationError::AlphaQualityOutOfRange
pub ValidationError::AlphaQualityOutOfRange::valid: core::ops::range::RangeInclusive<u8>
pub ValidationError::AlphaQualityOutOfRange::value: u8
pub ValidationError::FilterSharpnessOutOfRange
pub ValidationError::FilterSharpnessOutOfRange::valid: core::ops::range::RangeInclusive<u8>
pub ValidationError::FilterSharpnessOutOfRange::value: u8
pub ValidationError::FilterStrengthOutOfRange
pub ValidationError::FilterStrengthOutOfRange::valid: core::ops::range::RangeInclusive<u8>
pub ValidationError::FilterStrengthOutOfRange::value: u8
pub ValidationError::MethodOutOfRange
pub ValidationError::MethodOutOfRange::valid: core::ops::range::RangeInclusive<u8>
pub ValidationError::MethodOutOfRange::value: u8
pub ValidationError::NearLosslessOutOfRange
pub ValidationError::NearLosslessOutOfRange::valid: core::ops::range::RangeInclusive<u8>
pub ValidationError::NearLosslessOutOfRange::value: u8
pub ValidationError::PartitionLimitOutOfRange
pub ValidationError::PartitionLimitOutOfRange::valid: core::ops::range::RangeInclusive<u8>
pub ValidationError::PartitionLimitOutOfRange::value: u8
pub ValidationError::QualityNotFinite
pub ValidationError::QualityNotFinite::value: f32
pub ValidationError::QualityOutOfRange
pub ValidationError::QualityOutOfRange::valid: core::ops::range::RangeInclusive<f32>
pub ValidationError::QualityOutOfRange::value: f32
pub ValidationError::SegmentsOutOfRange
pub ValidationError::SegmentsOutOfRange::valid: core::ops::range::RangeInclusive<u8>
pub ValidationError::SegmentsOutOfRange::value: u8
pub ValidationError::SharpYuvConvergenceThresholdInvalid
pub ValidationError::SharpYuvConvergenceThresholdInvalid::value: f32
pub ValidationError::SnsStrengthOutOfRange
pub ValidationError::SnsStrengthOutOfRange::valid: core::ops::range::RangeInclusive<u8>
pub ValidationError::SnsStrengthOutOfRange::value: u8
pub ValidationError::TargetMutuallyExclusive
pub ValidationError::TargetMutuallyExclusive::first: &'static str
pub ValidationError::TargetMutuallyExclusive::second: &'static str
pub ValidationError::TargetPsnrOutOfRange
pub ValidationError::TargetPsnrOutOfRange::valid: core::ops::range::RangeInclusive<f32>
pub ValidationError::TargetPsnrOutOfRange::value: f32

pub fn DecodeConfig::with_dithering_strength(self, u8) -> Self
pub struct DecodeRequest<'a> [also: decoder]
pub fn DecodeRequest<'a>::decode(self) -> DecodeResult<(alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, u32, u32, PixelLayout)>

pub fn DecodeRequest<'a>::decode_rgb_into(self, &mut [u8]) -> DecodeResult<(u32, u32)>
pub fn DecodeRequest<'a>::decode_rgba(self) -> DecodeResult<(alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, u32, u32)>
pub fn DecodeRequest<'a>::decode_rgba_into(self, &mut [u8]) -> DecodeResult<(u32, u32)>
pub fn DecodeRequest<'a>::decode_yuv420(self) -> DecodeResult<decoder::YuvPlanes>
pub fn DecodeRequest<'a>::info(self) -> DecodeResult<ImageInfo>
pub fn DecodeRequest<'a>::new(&'a DecodeConfig, &'a [u8]) -> Self
pub fn DecodeRequest<'a>::stop(self, &'a dyn enough::Stop) -> Self
pub fn DecodeRequest<'a>::stride(self, u32) -> Self
pub struct EncodeRequest<'a> [also: encoder]
pub fn EncodeRequest<'a>::encode(self) -> EncodeResult<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>
pub fn EncodeRequest<'a>::encode_into(self, &mut alloc::vec::Vec<u8>) -> EncodeResult<()>
pub fn EncodeRequest<'a>::encode_to<W: std::io::Write>(self, W) -> EncodeResult<()>
pub fn EncodeRequest<'a>::encode_with_metrics(self) -> EncodeResult<(alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, super::zensim_target::ZensimEncodeMetrics)>
pub fn EncodeRequest<'a>::encode_with_stats(self) -> EncodeResult<(alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, encoder::EncodeStats)>
pub fn EncodeRequest<'a>::lossless(&'a config::LosslessConfig, &'a [u8], PixelLayout, u32, u32) -> Self
pub fn EncodeRequest<'a>::lossy(&'a config::LossyConfig, &'a [u8], PixelLayout, u32, u32) -> Self
pub fn EncodeRequest<'a>::new(&'a config::EncoderConfig, &'a [u8], PixelLayout, u32, u32) -> Self
pub fn EncodeRequest<'a>::with_exif(self, &'a [u8]) -> Self
pub fn EncodeRequest<'a>::with_icc_profile(self, &'a [u8]) -> Self
pub fn EncodeRequest<'a>::with_metadata(self, ImageMetadata<'a>) -> Self
pub fn EncodeRequest<'a>::with_progress(self, &'a dyn encoder::EncodeProgress) -> Self
pub fn EncodeRequest<'a>::with_stop(self, &'a dyn enough::Stop) -> Self
pub fn EncodeRequest<'a>::with_stride(self, usize) -> Self
pub fn EncodeRequest<'a>::with_xmp(self, &'a [u8]) -> Self
pub struct ImageInfo [also: decoder]
pub ImageInfo::exif: core::option::Option<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>
pub ImageInfo::format: decoder::BitstreamFormat
pub ImageInfo::frame_count: u32
pub ImageInfo::has_alpha: bool
pub ImageInfo::has_animation: bool
pub ImageInfo::height: u32
pub ImageInfo::icc_profile: core::option::Option<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>
pub ImageInfo::is_lossy: bool
pub ImageInfo::orientation: core::option::Option<zenpixels::orientation::Orientation>
pub ImageInfo::width: u32
pub ImageInfo::xmp: core::option::Option<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>
pub const ImageInfo::PROBE_BYTES: usize
pub fn ImageInfo::estimate_decode(&self, u8) -> heuristics::DecodeEstimate
pub fn ImageInfo::from_bytes(&[u8]) -> DecodeResult<Self>
pub fn ImageInfo::from_webp(&[u8]) -> DecodeResult<Self>
pub struct ImageMetadata<'a> [also: encoder]
pub ImageMetadata::exif: core::option::Option<&'a [u8]>
pub ImageMetadata::icc_profile: core::option::Option<&'a [u8]>
pub ImageMetadata::xmp: core::option::Option<&'a [u8]>
pub fn ImageMetadata<'a>::new() -> Self
pub fn ImageMetadata<'a>::with_exif(self, &'a [u8]) -> Self
pub fn ImageMetadata<'a>::with_icc_profile(self, &'a [u8]) -> Self
pub fn ImageMetadata<'a>::with_xmp(self, &'a [u8]) -> Self
#[non_exhaustive] pub struct Limits [also: decoder]
pub Limits::max_file_size: core::option::Option<u64>
pub Limits::max_frame_count: core::option::Option<u64>
pub Limits::max_height: core::option::Option<u32>
pub Limits::max_memory: core::option::Option<u64>
pub Limits::max_total_pixels: core::option::Option<u64>
pub Limits::max_width: core::option::Option<u32>
pub fn Limits::check_dimensions(&self, u32, u32) -> core::result::Result<(), whereat::at::At<DecodeError>>
pub fn Limits::check_file_size(&self, u64) -> core::result::Result<(), whereat::at::At<DecodeError>>
pub fn Limits::check_frame_count(&self, usize) -> core::result::Result<(), whereat::at::At<DecodeError>>
pub fn Limits::check_memory(&self, usize) -> core::result::Result<(), whereat::at::At<DecodeError>>
pub fn Limits::max_dimensions(self, u32, u32) -> Self
pub fn Limits::max_file_size(self, u64) -> Self
pub fn Limits::max_frame_count(self, u64) -> Self
pub fn Limits::max_memory(self, u64) -> Self
pub fn Limits::max_total_pixels(self, u64) -> Self
pub fn Limits::none() -> Self
pub struct StreamingDecoder [also: decoder]

pub type DecodeResult<T> = core::result::Result<T, whereat::at::At<DecodeError>> [also: decoder]
pub type EncodeResult<T> = core::result::Result<T, whereat::at::At<EncodeError>> [also: encoder]
